What We Do

Built to Last, Designed to Impress

Every project we take on is built with the same care — precision installs, clean finishes, lasting results.

Turf & Sod
Lush installs that look great year round
Pavers & Hardscape
Patios, walkways & retaining walls

Rock & Borders

We don't offer: Drainage & Grading Irrigation Repair Routine Maintenance Simple Repairs
Custom Design

We Design Your Dream Yard

Every great yard starts with a vision. Our team works with you to design a custom outdoor space that fits your home, your lifestyle, and your goals — from layout to plants to hardscape, we map it all out before a single shovel hits the ground.

📐
Full Yard Layout Planning
We plan turf zones, hardscape, planting areas and borders so everything works together perfectly.
🌿
Plant & Material Selection
We recommend the right plants, rock, turf and pavers for your climate, soil and style.
🏡
Built Exactly As Designed
Once you approve the design, our crew builds it — no surprises, no shortcuts.
🌳
Your Vision. Our Expertise.
Tell us what you have in mind — we'll help you shape it into a yard you'll love coming home to.
✔ Custom layouts tailored to your property
✔ Low-maintenance & drought-friendly options
✔ Built by the same crew who designed it

Ready to Transform Your Yard?

Text us photos of your yard for the fastest quote. We'll get back to you same day.

💬 Text Us Now

Our Services

Every service we offer is built around lasting quality, clean installs, and results that impress for years.

Turf & Sod
Fresh installs and complete replacements that give you a lush, clean lawn with tight borders and a polished finish that lasts.
  • New sod installs & full replacements
  • Artificial & natural turf options
  • Clean edge & border finishing
  • Base leveling & soil prep
  • Striped & custom patterns
Pavers & Hardscape
Patios, walkways, driveways and decorative concrete that are built to last decades and look sharp from day one.
  • Stamped & decorative concrete
  • Patio & outdoor living areas
  • Walkways & pathways
  • Driveway upgrades & borders
  • Retaining walls & terracing
Planting & Design
Strategic planting, mulching, and custom landscape design that frames your property and dramatically boosts curb appeal.
  • Trees, shrubs & ground cover
  • Mulch & clean rock installs
  • Custom landscape design
  • Full yard cleanups & refreshes
  • Seasonal planting plans
Rock & Borders
Clean rock finishes and decorative borders that give your yard a modern, low-maintenance look you'll enjoy year round.
  • Decomposed granite & pea gravel
  • River rock & decorative stone
  • Metal & concrete edge borders
  • Weed barrier installation
  • Flagstone & stepping stones
Retaining Walls
Structural and decorative retaining walls that solve slope problems and add definition to your outdoor space.
  • Block & stone retaining walls
  • Slope terracing & leveling
  • Decorative garden walls
  • Drainage-ready construction
  • Manual access & tight spaces
ℹ️

Services We Don't Offer

We focus exclusively on installation and design to give every project our full attention.

Drainage & Grading Irrigation Repair Routine Maintenance Simple Repairs

"Green Landscaping did a phenomenal job with our yard project! We have a steep slope in our backyard that they were able to terrace with two retaining walls. Limited access so work had to be done manually — they handled it perfectly."
